STAT ORDERS
1. Contact the department for approval to add to the schedule, then send an Add-On email to the DL. "STAT" must be on a valid order (5 criteria).
2. Ask if it has STAT.
3. If no open slot, obtain approval to double book (except THAllen) or refer to another location.
4. Document the approving person's name in RAD notes.
5. Inform the caller of potential delay.
6. Send an Add-On email to the facility and call the radiology department for a heads-up.
ASAP / SAME DAY
For same-day scheduling, obtain department permission. Document the approving person's name in RAD Notes and send an Add-On email.
If it's 2:00 p.m. or later and the caller wants the next day before 10:00 a.m., obtain department permission. Document the approving person's name in RAD Notes and send an Add-On email.
If it's 2:00 p.m. or later and the caller wants the next day after 10:00 a.m., schedule the appointment, call the department, and send an Add-On email.
Valid order (5 criteria) must be faxed in with NO failed MN, an Add-On email sent, and the procedure must not require authorization (Ultrasound).
For modalities requiring authorization, ASAP is typically 48 business hours unless permission is granted by the entity.
SPECIAL NEEDS
If answered yes, note the required assistance in RAD notes: wheelchair, lift, interpreter, limited range of motion, cane, etc. For lift or interpreter, send an Add-On email.
INSURANCE
N/A

STAT ORDERS
1. Contact the department for approval to add to the schedule, then send an Add-On email to the DL. "STAT" must be on a valid order (5 criteria).
2. Ask if it has STAT.
3. If no open slot, obtain approval to double book (except THAllen) or refer to another location.
4. Document the approving person's name in RAD notes.
5. Inform the caller of potential delay.
6. Send an Add-On email to the facility and call the radiology department for a heads-up.
ASAP / SAME DAY
For same-day scheduling, obtain department permission. Document the approving person's name in RAD Notes and send an Add-On email.
If it's 2:00 p.m. or later and the caller wants the next day before 10:00 a.m., obtain department permission. Document the approving person's name in RAD Notes and send an Add-On email.
If it's 2:00 p.m. or later and the caller wants the next day after 10:00 a.m., schedule the appointment, call the department, and send an Add-On email.
Valid order (5 criteria) must be faxed in with NO failed MN, an Add-On email sent, and the procedure must not require authorization (Ultrasound).
For modalities requiring authorization, ASAP is typically 48 business hours unless permission is granted by the entity.
SPECIAL NEEDS
If answered yes, note the required assistance in RAD notes: wheelchair, lift, interpreter, limited range of motion, cane, etc. For lift or interpreter, send an Add-On email.
